options.name: --default-price
options.description:
Use as the default price for matched resource 
types

options.name: --fixed-cost-price
options.description:
Fixed cost price applied once the threshold is 
reached

options.name: --only-within-available-times
options.description:
Only apply within the resource's available 
times

options.description: Price factor for average demand periods

options.description: Price factor for high demand periods

options.name: --price-factor-low-demand
options.description: Price factor for low demand periods

options.description:
Whether the price is visible on the portal and 
app
